channel.title: Aamukatsaus — Daily AI Briefing
channel.description: Private, auto-generated 25-minute morning briefing on AI and tech: deep dives, quick hits and a research corner. Fresh every day before 06:00 Helsinki.
channel.itunes:author: Aamukatsaus

item.title: AI Briefing — 23 July 2026
item.description: Deep dives: OpenAI’s accidental cyberattack against Hugging Face is science fiction that happened · Treasury threatens sanctions after White House claims Moonshot distilled Anthropic’s Fable · Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business · After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe. Plus 7 quick hits and the research corner.

item.title: AI Briefing — 22 July 2026
item.description: Deep dives: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face. Plus 3 quick hits and the research corner.
